class.name: Ribbon
class.brief_description: A node used to draw lines in spaces, dedicated to visual effects.
class.description: The Ribbon node is a node that draws a flat line in space, either billboarded or not. It can be used to draw a trail, usually to complement effects for projectiles, or to draw a beam, a line of a given length. This node is targeted for visual effects. For solid lines, please refer to CSG nodes.

method.name: get_current_length
method.description: Gets the current length of the ribbon, in meters.

members.member: The length of the beam. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
The color of the ribbon, baked into the ribbon's vertices. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
The color gradient across the ribbon.
The lifetime of the trail, when in [member limit_mode] lifetime.
What limits the trail existence between a given time and a given length.
The material mode for the ribbon. Use material mode custom to supply a custom material.
When in limit mode length, the maximum length of the trail.

Alignent of the ribbon. Possible options are [constant MESH_ALIGNMENT_LOCAL] for a 3D line, and [constant MESH_ALIGNMENT_BILLBOARD] for a billboarded line. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
Minimum distance before adding a new section.
Pin the UV to their position in space. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.

Operating mode of the ribbon. Use [constant RIBBON_MODE_TRAIL] for trails and [constant RIBBON_MODE_BEAM] for a beam: a straight line with a given length and given subdivisions. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
How to tile the UVs across the length of the ribbon. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
UV multiplier across the length of the ribbon. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
Width of the ribbon. Changing it causes the ribbon to be rebuilt.
Width across the length of the ribbon.

constants.constant: Setting [member ribbon_mode] to trail causes the ribbon to leave a line when moving the ribbon node. Always in world space.
Setting [member ribbon_mode] to trail causes the ribbon to draw a line on its Z axis of length [member beam_length]. Always in world space.
Align the ribbon to the local Y of the ribbon node.
Align the ribbon to the camera, causing each section to billboard.
Limit the trail length in time.
Limit the trail length in size.
Maxmum value for enum [enum LimitMode]. Relevant only when in trail mode.
